problem id: 0dfd7674
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  00110100 -> 01100101
  00010001 -> 01100110
  10011000 -> 00010110
  00101111 -> 10010101
  00001010 -> 10010110
  01111111 -> 00100001
  11001110 -> 00101111
  11111001 -> 10001100
  11010110 -> 00011001
  00110011 -> 10101010

query: 01101010
predicted answer: 01001110
